_comment: Per-event manual overrides applied by tools/sync_events.py after parsing/building events. Use this to correct mis-tagged or otherwise wrong fields on events whose Discord-side authors aren't going to retro-edit the post. Survives Discord edits — the override always wins. Schema: { id: { field: value, ... } } where field is any top-level events.json key (tag, country, countryRaw, province, date, ...). Keys starting with `_` are treated as comments and ignored. Tag values must match a canonical tag in assets/event-tags.json.
